# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-docker-builder
  namespace: build
  labels:
    app: docker-builder
    purpose: ci-cd
  annotations:
    description: "CI/CD pod for building and pushing Docker images"
spec:
  serviceAccountName: ci-cd-builder
  automountServiceAccountToken: false

  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: false
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault

  containers:
    - name: docker-builder
      image: docker:27.1-dind
      imagePullPolicy: Always

      securityContext:
        privileged: false
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
        runAsUser: 0
        capabilities:
          drop:
            - ALL
          add:
            # Minimum capabilities needed for rootless DinD / buildkit
            - SYS_ADMIN
            - NET_ADMIN
            - SETGID
            - SETUID
            - CHOWN
            - DAC_OVERRIDE
            - FOWNER
            - KILL
            - NET_BIND_SERVICE

      resources:
        requests:
          cpu: "500m"
          memory: "1Gi"
          ephemeral-storage: "10Gi"
        limits:
          cpu: "2"
          memory: "4Gi"
          ephemeral-storage: "50Gi"

      env:
        - name: DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR
          value: "/certs"
        - name: DOCKER_HOST
          value: "unix:///run/user/1000/docker.sock"
        - name: DOCKER_BUILDKIT
          value: "1"
        # Pull registry credentials from secrets, never hardcoded
        - name: DOCKER_REGISTRY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: docker-registry-credentials
              key: registry-url
        - name: DOCKER_USERNAME
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: docker-registry-credentials
              key: username
        - name: DOCKER_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: docker-registry-credentials
              key: password

      volumeMounts:
        - name: dind-storage
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
        - name: docker-certs
          mountPath: /certs
          readOnly: false
        - name: build-workspace
          mountPath: /workspace
        - name: tmp-volume
          mountPath: /tmp

      livenessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 30
        periodSeconds: 30
        timeoutSeconds: 10
        failureThreshold: 3

      readinessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 10
        timeoutSeconds: 5
        failureThreshold: 3

      lifecycle:
        preStop:
          exec:
            command:
              - /bin/sh
              - -c
              - "docker system prune -af --volumes && sleep 5"

  volumes:
    - name: dind-storage
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: 40Gi
    - name: docker-certs
      emptyDir:
        medium: Memory
        sizeLimit: 10Mi
    - name: build-workspace
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: 10Gi
    - name: tmp-volume
      emptyDir:
        medium: Memory
        sizeLimit: 256Mi

  # Do NOT mount the host Docker socket - use DinD instead for isolation
  # Mounting /var/run/docker.sock from the host is a critical security risk
  # as it grants full control over the host's Docker daemon

  restartPolicy: Never
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
  activeDeadlineSeconds: 3600

  # Schedule only on dedicated build nodes with appropriate taints
  nodeSelector:
    node-role.kubernetes.io/build: "true"

  tolerations:
    - key: "dedicated"
      operator: "Equal"
      value: "ci-cd-build"
      effect: "NoSchedule"

  # Prevent scheduling on control plane nodes
  affinity:
    nodeAffinity:
      requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
        nodeSelectorTerms:
          - matchExpressions:
              - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/control-plane
                operator: DoesNotExist

  # DNS policy for build isolation
  dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst

  # Set a hostname for logging/tracing
  hostname: docker-builder

---
# Dedicated ServiceAccount with minimal permissions
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder
  namespace: build
  labels:
    app: docker-builder
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
# NetworkPolicy to restrict egress to only the container registry and DNS
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder-netpol
  namespace: build
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: docker-builder
      purpose: ci-cd
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress: []
  egress:
    # Allow DNS resolution
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
    # Allow HTTPS to container registries
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443
    # Allow HTTP for insecure registries if needed (remove if not required)
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 80

---
# ResourceQuota to limit total build resources in the namespace
apiVersion: v1
kind: ResourceQuota
metadata:
  name: build-namespace-quota
  namespace: build
spec:
  hard:
    pods: "5"
    requests.cpu: "4"
    requests.memory: "8Gi"
    limits.cpu: "10"
    limits.memory: "20Gi"
